name: Antipasto Vinaigrette
recipeIngredient: 2/3 cup Canned low-sodium chicken broth, undiluted
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a jar.
2. Cover tightly and shake vigorously to blend.
3. Shake well before serving.
Per Serving: 75 Calories (22% from fat) Fat 1.8G (Saturated Fat 0.4G) Protein 3.4G Carbohydrate 12.0G Cholesterol5MG Sodium213MG
